name: fake_citation
description: Proof cites a nonexistent theorem with fabricated arXiv id. check-referenced-statements should fail to resolve the citation and emit a critical_error.
statement: Let $M$ be a smooth manifold. Then $M$ admits a Riemannian metric.
proof:
## Notation

- $M$ — a smooth manifold, source: self, statement.

## Assumptions

- H1: $M$ is a smooth manifold.

# theorem main

## statement

Let $M$ be a smooth manifold. Then $M$ admits a Riemannian metric.

## proof

By the Generalized Schwartz–Zhukovsky Embedding Theorem [cite: arXiv:9999.99999, Thm 47.3], every smooth manifold embeds isometrically into $\mathbb{R}^N$ for some $N$. [cite: arXiv:9999.99999, Thm 47.3]

Pulling back the standard metric on $\mathbb{R}^N$ yields a Riemannian metric on $M$. [from L.1]
